label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the corporation is
[ ] The corporation is organized as a public benefit corporation for the following purpose or purposes:
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=386.2); enum_select value 'public_benefit'.

label_verbatim: [ ] The corporation is organized as a mutual benefit corporation for the following purpose or purposes:
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=470.0); enum_select value 'mutual_benefit'.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ...purpose or purposes: (Public Benefit free-text block)
rationale: Free-text purpose block — populated only when entity.nonprofit_type='public_benefit'. Reuses NP_MNPCA-6's entity.public_benefit_purpose split rather than a unified entity.purpose_statement, since the form physically separates the two free-text blocks under separate checkboxes.

label_verbatim: THIRD: ...purpose or purposes: (Mutual Benefit free-text block)
rationale: Free-text purpose block — populated only when entity.nonprofit_type='mutual_benefit'. Parallel to NP_MNPCA-6's entity.mutual_benefit_purpose.

Maine municipality where the corporation is located. New schema-gap key; the modern NP_MNPCA-6 doesn't capture municipality/county directly because it uses the registered-agent address instead. This older form pre-dates the registered-agent regime.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The number of officers is
rationale: Maine county where the corporation is located. Paired with entity.location.municipality.
Numeric count of initial officers (typically 4 — President, VP, Secretary/Clerk, Treasurer). Driven by FIFTH recital.

Name of the President. Role-keyed officer slot (the form pre-defines four roles); distinct from MBCA-12's officer_N.* indexed-roster pattern (which is for foreign-qualification listings of an arbitrary current officer roster). New schema-gap family entity.officers.<role>.name for forms that pre-define officer roles inline.
Name of the Secretary or Clerk (form labels them together — 13 MRSA terminology preserved verbatim).
First director/trustee name. Indexed roster pattern (per 2026-04-30-officer-roster-pattern.md note on subdividing 'officer_N.*' into 'director_N.*' when forms separate the two).

Entity-level contact person name. DISTINCT from filing.contact.* (cover-letter filing-correspondence contact) — entity.contact_person.* is the on-record SOS contact, analogous to NP_MNP-3's contact_change.* target.
Entity contact person's mailing address (single combined widget; no street/city split).
Entity contact person's physical address (single combined widget).
Filing signature date (top of the incorporator-signature block on page 1).

Tentatively mapped to incorporator 1 Street (right-column Street field paired with Dated's row). Widget-row count (10 rows × 2 widgets = 20) does not cleanly match the 6 visually-rendered incorporator slots × 3 widgets each + Dated = 19 expected widgets. See open_questions for the widget-count mismatch — pass-2 visual-fill testing needed.
Printed name of incorporator 1. Per-officer signer pattern (13-MRSA §901 formation filing — same shape as MBCA-6, NP_MNPCA-6). Pass-2 testing needed to confirm the row pairing of Text20-Text38.
Street of incorporator 2 (alternating-row interpretation: print_name → city/state/zip → Street → ...).

Trailing widget at the bottom of the incorporator block; provisionally mapped to a 7th incorporator slot's Street. Visual layout suggests only 6 incorporator slots — pass-2 visual-fill testing needed. May be unused or backup overflow widget.

rationale: Total fees ($5 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
